name: KAMA Adaptive Exhaustion
edge_hypothesis: KAMA (Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average) dynamically adjusts its smoothing speed based on price efficiency — it slows down in noise (ranging) and speeds up in trends. This makes KAMA itself a regime detector: when price is below a flat KAMA, it's both ranging AND pulled back. Combining KAMA position with CCI exhaustion (<-100/>100) creates a dual-confirmation mean-reversion signal where the regime detection (KAMA adaptiveness) and the entry trigger (CCI exhaustion) are mathematically independent. Unlike ADX (which DESTROYS mean-reversion per our findings) or CHOP (which is separate from the MA), KAMA integrates regime awareness into the trend line itself. KAMA has been partially tested (KAMA Vortex Trend) but never as a regime-aware mean-reversion anchor paired with CCI.

variants.name: kama_cci_exhaust_v1_8to1
variants.description: Base variant: price below KAMA (ranging pullback) + CCI exhaustion beyond -100/+100. No explicit regime gate — KAMA's adaptive behavior IS the regime detection. 8:1 R:R.
filters: KAMA position: close vs KAMA_10_2_30 (adaptive regime detection)
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
R:R = 8:1. Needs 11.1% win rate to break even after fees.
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: KAMA_10_2_30 — Kaufman Adaptive MA. Slows in ranging (implicit regime gate), speeds in trending. Price below KAMA = pullback.
CCI_20_0.015 beyond +/-100 = statistical exhaustion. Independent from KAMA — provides entry timing.

variants.name: kama_cci_chop_v2_8to1
variants.description: KAMA + CCI with explicit CHOP ranging gate added. Tests whether double regime confirmation (adaptive KAMA + CHOP) improves signal quality vs v1 which relies on KAMA alone.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
R:R = 8:1. Needs 11.1% win rate to break even after fees.
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: KAMA_10_2_30 — adaptive MA as pullback anchor and implicit regime detector.
CHOP_14_1_100 > 50 = explicit ranging gate. Tests if redundant with KAMA adaptiveness.

variants.name: kama_cci_deep_v3_10to1
variants.description: Tighter CCI threshold (-150/+150) for deeper exhaustion entries. 10:1 R:R. Tests whether waiting for deeper CCI extremes improves win rate enough to justify fewer trades.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (15.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
R:R = 10:1. Needs 9.1% win rate to break even after fees.
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 15.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: KAMA_10_2_30 — adaptive MA as pullback anchor.
CCI_20_0.015 beyond +/-150 = deep exhaustion. Stricter than v1's +/-100.

indicator_roles.baseline: KAMA_10_2_30 (adaptive MA — implicit regime detection + pullback anchor)
indicator_roles.confirmation: CCI_20_0.015 exhaustion signal (v1/v3) + optional CHOP_14_1_100 gate (v2)
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 for position sizing and R:R
